name: Cream Consomme
recipeIngredient: 1 red apple, unpeeled and chopped (for garnish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the grated onion and apple to the consomme and cook until tender, about 12 minutes.
2. Puree in a blender.
3. Put through a strainer.
4. Stir in cream and season with paprika and curry powder.
5. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
6. Reheat slowly, just until heated through.
7. Serve in small cups garnished with chopped unpeeled apple sprinkled with lemon juice.
